categories.name: Webhook Payload Variation
categories.description: AC webhook payload format changes per event type

categories.name: Burst Rate Limit
categories.description: AC webhook bursts vs Slack rate limit

categories.name: Webhook Durability
categories.description: AC webhook retries and URL changes

mappings.notes: Same middleware route handles both payload formats. One template breaks for the other event type.
mappings.fixStrategy: Separate routes per webhook type. Or use conditional template in middleware.

mappings.toolAValue: AC bulk action: 100 webhooks in <1 second
mappings.toolBValue: Slack: 1 req/sec per method per workspace
mappings.notes: Bulk tag addition triggers individual webhooks for each contact. All 100 fire within seconds.
mappings.fixStrategy: Queue in middleware. Rate-limit to 1 req/sec. Aggregate when > 10 items.

mappings.toolAValue: AC webhook retry (same event, different delivery ID)
mappings.toolBValue: Slack: duplicate message if not deduped
mappings.notes: AC retries webhook if first response takes > 5s. Middleware processes both, sends 2 identical Slack messages.
mappings.fixStrategy: Dedup by AC webhook event ID in middleware. Use in-memory cache of processed IDs.

errors.errorName: AC Webhook Format Breaks Slack Template
errors.description: Contact webhook payload differs from deal webhook. Same template fails.
errors.fixSummary: Separate routes per webhook event type.

errors.errorName: Bulk Tag Burst Exceeds Slack Rate Limit
